author: Flippy
msg:
Even 20 per isp is worthless nowadays. 3 or 4 devices per IP give max range 0.4 to 0.5. 
5 or more and its getting more close to 0.2 per device.

Over 10 devices 0.05.. 
20 devices is 0.02..

1-1.2 UP per IP seems the average achievable max amount
